text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 96 

GAP_INNPP_COPAY_OS 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Non-Preferred Pharmacy Copay for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 
1 or 3 months) on this tier, using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP) during the coverage 
gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
